Course.title: Course
Course.description: A competitive exam preparation course offered by Gupta Classes.

title.description: The name of the course (e.g., IBPS PO, SSC CGL).

description.description: A detailed description of the course content.

price.description: The enrollment fee for the course.

duration.description: The length of the course (e.g., 6 months).

imageUrl.description: A URL to a representative image for the course.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: A registered student at Gupta Classes.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the student.

name.description: The full name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

enrolledCourses.description: A list of course IDs the student is enrolled in.

Result.title: Result
Result.description: A success story or rank holder from Gupta Classes.

studentName.description: The name of the successful student.

exam.description: The exam they cleared (e.g., IBPS PO 2024).

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: An announcement or update for students.

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: A message sent via the contact form.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of registered users (students and admins).

/contactMessages/{messageId}.description: Collection of inquiries from the contact form.
